3148420.name: Mansion-Tyurma
3148420.description:
Because of things you did, you were confined in this unknown place, with new rules for you, in which you will have to go through 3 acts to be able to leave.
1- Find your punishment card that you must fulfill in order to get out of there.
2- Fulfill the punishment while interacting with the inhabitants of this place.
3- Go to the exit where only those who have permission can enter.
During your stay in this place you can influence its inhabitants and therefore the decisions you make will have consequences and much more in the last act since for the inhabitants you are not the first "guest", as they call it, to arrive.
3148420.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
